title: Fix Daily Dashboard date selector to default to today's actual date

requirements.summary: Fix the Daily Dashboard date initialization so that when the page loads, the selected date state is set to today's actual current date and the date selector correctly reflects and displays today's true date
acceptanceCriteria: On initial load of the Daily Dashboard, the date selector displays today's actual current date.
The date state is initialized using the real current date (e.g., `new Date()` at component mount), not a hardcoded or previously stored stale date.
The calendar/date picker input value reflects today's date in the correct format (YYYY-MM-DD or locale equivalent).
If the user navigates away and returns to the Dashboard without a specific date parameter, today's date is shown again.
Switching dates via the date selector still works correctly after the fix.

file_operations.description: Update the date state initialization to use `new Date()` to get today's actual current date instead of any hardcoded or stale value. Ensure the initial state correctly formats today's date as YYYY-MM-DD for the date input. Verify that the date input element's value prop is properly bound to the formatted current date string on component mount.
